creator: scheidell@FreeBSD.org
text:
On 6/16/12 1:35 PM, Zhihao Yuan wrote:
> I guess (randomly)
>
> 1. txt2mb is incorrectly build?
> 2. db.txt is wrong?
>
> Please build it manually and send me these two files, and I'll check them.
>
I actually have no way of building it manually.  the tinderbox creates a 
temporary jail, mounts a clean os, builds the package, saves the package 
(if it can), than deletes the jail.
(its running tinderd from ports, and honestly? I don't know if I can get 
it to copy these over before it unmounts the jail)

I seem to remember you telling me on another package that there was an 
issue with 7.4.
This might be the same thing.

If I have a chance later, I will see if I can figure out how to copy 
those out of the jail before it unmounts.


--
